title: Paracyclea insularis

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Paracyclea insularis include alkaloids, terpenoids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
